channel.title: 胡亚敏的博客
channel.description: Recent content on 胡亚敏的博客

item.title: About
item.author: huym@mail.ustc.edu.cn (Yamin Hu)
item.description: Skills appc activemq agile ajax android angular bootstrap bower cakephp codeigniter composer continuous deployment css debian docker flux fuelphp git github gohugo google maps api grunt gulp html iojs java javascript jenkins jeykill jquery json junit koa less linux lxc open container maven memcached meterial design mesos meteor modelisation mongodb mysql node nosql npm php poo postgresql prestashop qemu rkt react responsive design rest runc rom cooking sass scrum spring sql travis ubuntu uml vagrant virtualisation web services xml

item.title: 尝试Hugo
item.author: huym@mail.ustc.edu.cn (Yamin Hu)
item.description: 安装brew ruby -e "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/master/install)" 安装Hugo brew install hugo 创建站点 hugo new site MyBlog 增加theme fork theme:hyde-y (从github到码云） 给站点增加theme cd MyBLog git init git submodule add https://gitee.com/yaminhu/hyde-y.git themes/hyde-y 增加内容 根据hyde-y的一个live site的source code，修改content和data目录下的文件和config.toml。
